entities.name: Dense Alignment
entities.context: Process of running alignment between job requirements, candidate stories, and resumes

entities.name: The System
entities.context: Decomposes roles into ~30 items and runs dense alignment for job applications

relationships.context: Confirms that additional cost exists when candidates apply to jobs
System decomposes roles into ~30 items and runs dense alignment between requirements, stories, and resumes
Per-job alignment is distinct from and additive to initial resume/story processing
Heavy analysis should be restricted to candidates who have shown promise
Uses this thought experiment to reframe the optimization problem
